title: Pecute Dog Water Bottle 500ml, Portable Puppy Drinking Bottles Leak Proof Pet Travel Bottle, Lightweight Water Dispenser Bowl for Outdoor Walks Trips Hikes Travels
features: 🐾【𝐀𝐋𝐋-𝐈𝐍-𝐎𝐍𝐄 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐆𝐍】Our bottle and water bowl integrated design is good for your furry companion! The foldable leaf easily flips out to become a water bowl, eliminating the need for an extra bowl. After drinking, simply fold it back - it's that easy!

🐾【𝐋𝐀𝐑𝐆𝐄 𝐂𝐀𝐏𝐀𝐂𝐈𝐓𝐘 】Choose from three capacities: M-500ml, L-650ml and XL-850ml. Ensure your pet stays well hydrated during long walks, hikes, travels, and other outdoor activities. Suitable for large, medium, and small dogs.

🐾【𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐖𝐄𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 ＆ 𝐏𝐎𝐑𝐓𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄】Our handy-sized bottle fits into most backpack bottle pockets and won't get your travel bag wet. Equipped with a hand strap, it's easy to carry. It also comes with an extra carabiner that can be attached wherever you need it.

🐾【𝐒𝐈𝐌𝐏𝐋𝐄 𝐎𝐏𝐄𝐑𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍, 𝐍𝐎 𝐋𝐄𝐀𝐊𝐀𝐆𝐄】With our one-button open and lock feature and one-handed design, water flows out easily by simply pressing the bottle. The water locking mechanism ensures it completely prevents leak, so you don't have to worry about drips.

🐾【𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐎𝐃-𝐆𝐑𝐀𝐃𝐄 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋】Our collapsible bowl is made of safe, compliant silicone material, good for your pet to use. The bottle's main body is made of LDPE, a plastic that's soft, lightweight, tough, and flexible.
